statement_framework: For [audience], [brand] is the [category] that [differentiator] because [reason to believe].

drafts.text: For marketing teams using AI, Aligna is the brand-voice QA layer that scores every draft against your voice because it sits after the writer, not instead of it.

anti_positioning: Aligna is NOT for teams who want another AI that writes the copy for them.
chosen: For marketing teams writing with AI, Aligna is the brand-voice QA layer that scores every draft against your voice and shows what to fix — because consistency is the one thing AI volume puts most at risk.
